---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Contact"
description: "Get in touch with Dr. Erika C. Freeman, aquatic biogeochemist at IGB Berlin — collaborations, prospective students, and DOM chemistry."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.section-label}
Contact
:::
# contact {.section-title}

::: {.contact-block}

::: {.label}
Email
:::
[erika.freeman@igb-berlin.de](mailto:erika.freeman@igb-berlin.de)

::: {.label}
Office
:::
::: {}
Leibniz-Institut für Gewässerökologie und Binnenfischerei (IGB)
Müggelseedamm 310
12587 Berlin, Germany
:::

::: {.label}
Elsewhere
:::
[GitHub](https://github.com/erikacfreeman) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7161-6038) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/erikacfreeman/) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E6WubOUAAAAJ) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/erikacfreeman.bsky.social)

::: {.label}
CV
:::
[View CV](cv.html) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[Download PDF](cv.pdf)

::: {.label}
Prospective students & collaborators
:::
If you're interested in environmental metabolomics, the ecology of molecules, DOM chemistry, or how land use change rewrites freshwater carbon — please get in touch. A short note about your background and what excites you is the best way to start a conversation.

:::
